archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury / Old Money Tech (Adapted for Light Theme)

brand_identity.name: Orbit Infra Projects
brand_identity.vibe: Corporate, Premium, Modern, Elegant, High Trust, Conversion Focused

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, Clean Grid Patterns

grid_patterns.dashboard_admin: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-6 (Sidebar col-span-1, Main col-span-4)

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A2240] text-white hover:bg-[#0E2F58] px-8 py-4 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A2240] hover:bg-[#B3922A] px-8 py-4 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 font-semibold
buttons.outline: border border-[#0A2240] text-[#0A2240] hover:bg-[#0A2240] hover:text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300

cards.property_card: bg-white border border-[#E9ECEF] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(10,34,64,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 group overflow-hidden rounded-sm
cards.image_hover: group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-in-out w-full h-full object-cover
cards.tags: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-[#D4AF37] text-white text-xs uppercase font-bold tracking-wider px-3 py-1 z-10

inputs.standard: border border-[#E9ECEF] focus:border-[#0A2240] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A2240] rounded-sm py-3 px-4 bg-[#F8F9FA] text-[#0A2240] w-full placeholder:text-[#4A5A70]/60

header.style: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E9ECEF] sticky top-0 z-50
header.nav_links: text-[#0A2240] hover:text-[#D4AF37] font-medium transition-colors text-sm uppercase tracking-wide

animations.scroll: Smooth scrolling via CSS scroll-behavior or Lenis.
animations.reveal: Fade in and translate-y-4 using framer-motion with duration 0.6s and easeOut.
animations.hover: Image scaling inside overflow-hidden wrappers, subtle shadow increases, and solid color slides for buttons.
animations.micro_interactions: Animated stat counters when in view. Filter tabs sliding indicator.

hero_and_exterior.description: Modern luxury villa exterior with pool - Ideal for hero section background.
Luxury villa with waterfall - Good for featured property listings.

interiors.description: Modern premium apartment living room - Amenities and interior gallery sections.
Spacious premium living area - Good for single property detail view header or slider.

lifestyle.description: Family relaxing on modern wooden balcony - Ideal for About Us or 'Why Choose Us' trust sections.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format. Example: data-testid='property-card-1', data-testid='book-visit-btn', data-testid='emi-calculator-form'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts and set them as the primary serif and sans-serif fonts in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure all components are created as standard .js files, NOT .tsx files.
Use standard Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to match the premium theme. Remove heavy border radius (use rounded-sm or rounded-none) to maintain the sharp luxury corporate feel.
Implement the exact color codes provided for Navy (#0A2240) and Gold (#D4AF37). Do not invent other shades unless they are slight tints/shades for hover states.
Use Playfair Display for all H1, H2, and H3 headings. Ensure tight tracking. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for body text and UI labels.
Do not use a transparent header without a backdrop-blur. Nav links must be fully legible at all times.
The Hero overlay should use a subtle gradient (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 to-black/20) rather than a flat solid blanket overlay so the premium architecture remains clearly visible.
For the EMI Calculator and Home Loan application section, structure it with clear input groups inside a #F8F9FA background container with a gold accent border or line.
The Admin dashboard must be high-contrast and data-dense. Use #0A2240 for the sidebar and white for the main content area. Make data tables clean with #E9ECEF borders.
For WhatsApp integration, add a fixed floating action button at the bottom right with the standard WhatsApp green color (#25D366), linking to phone number 9441085800.
Prepare the codebase structure to support multi-language (English + Telugu) by creating string dictionaries or i18n placeholders for key sections.
For Customer Reviews, utilize lucide-react star icons filled with the accent gold color (#D4AF37) to denote premium ratings.
